title: pterocyclus rivulorum
intro: Pterocyclus rivulorum, also known as the "Rivulorum orchid", is a species of orchid native to Southeast Asia, specifically found in Malaysia and Thailand. The medicinal properties of Pterocyclus rivulorum lie in its roots, which have been traditionally used to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. Pterocyclus rivulorum is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its herbal preparations are also used topically as a poultice or ointment to soothe skin irritations.
